name: Mandelbrot
recipeInstructions:
Mix flour, salt, and sugar. Beat eggs until thickened, then add sugar, oil, lemon juice, and vanilla while beating continuously. Gradually add the flour mixture, followed by almonds and optional dried fruit, creating a soft dough. Lightly sprinkle cinnamon mixed with 1 tablespoon of sugar over flattened loaves.
Grease a cookie sheet and shape two loaves, about 2 inches high. Bake at 350°F for approximately 30 to 40 minutes until lightly browned or a cake tester comes out clean. Cool and slice into 3-inch pieces. Toast one side lightly in the oven under the broiler, then turn off and toast the other side.
